scope: Ten child-safe cozy companion-care prop candidates only; no runtime mapping or production approval.
compatibility_notes: Normalized to 192x192 transparent PNGs for small prop, inventory, and home companion-corner proof review.
Designed with rounded warm proportions intended to sit near Sunny companion and home-interior candidate scale, pending composition review.

generation_method.postprocess: same script validates alpha/residue and writes manifest/contact sheet
generation_method.notes: Per LESSON-022, final gate is based on actual RGBA alpha audit, not generator flags.

checks: large opaque background block risk scan

items.footprint_recommendation: 1x1 low soft furniture prop; non-blocking or low pet-only rest marker
items.layer_recommendation: above home floor / yard mat, below companion and actor feet
items.visual_style_notes: child-safe cozy town companion-care prop, rounded proportions, warm Animal Crossing-like home/town scale, no text or brand marks

generation_provenance.method: local transparent RGBA vector/raster synthesis using Pillow
generation_provenance.raw_alpha_note: No external RGB/opaque raw was used; real alpha is verified directly on the emitted PNG per LESSON-022.

risks: Round cushion could read as generic home furniture unless reviewed beside companion-care UI.
Proof-only candidate; no runtime, ThemeProfile, AssetResolver, data, or shared-test mapping.
Final art direction review is required before any production/runtime use.
